action.reasoning: Observation: 20.93% accuracy with sketch augmentations. Analysis: TTA and more aggressive augmentations should help bridge domain gap. Decision: Implement TTA in predict.py (grayscale + edge versions), and train with stronger sketch augmentations for 20 epochs.
